# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: example-app-no-istio
  labels:
    app: example-app
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: example-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: example-app
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false" # Disable Istio sidecar injection for this pod
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: example-container
          image: nginx:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limitS:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: another-service-no-istio
  labels:
    app: another-service
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: another-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: another-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false" # Disable Istio sidecar injection for this pod
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: another-container
          image: redis:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6379
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "50m"
              memory: "64Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
